step_rationale: ACS-specific miRNA; dysregulated in acute MI; predicts MACE; likely regulates coagulation/thrombotic responses.
mechanism: miR-361-5p dysregulation in acute MI associates with altered coagulation cascade activation and adverse major events.

references.title: Dysregulation of serum miR-361-5p serves as a biomarker to predict disease onset and short-term prognosis in acute coronary syndrome patients.
Atherosclerosis-related circulating miRNAs as novel and sensitive predictors for acute myocardial infarction.
